items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement for performance analytics (open rate, click rate, conversion) is not directly evidenced in the provided data. While the linked use case outlines the need for performance analytics, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive status.
